usagePatterns.theme-variant-icons: Each theme variant (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy) has its own predefined icon set. All themes start with Dela custom logo (RS_DelaDefault.svg default, RS_Dela_Active.svg active) as the first item. CP has 3 sections with 3, 2, and 4 items (lines 42-64). VP, PPM, and Maconomy have 3 sections with 8, 3, and 3 items respectively (currently identical configurations). The appropriate variant is shown via CSS based on html theme class (lines 369-393).
usagePatterns.custom-icon-support: Navigation items support two icon approaches: standard Icon component (icon: 'icon-name') or custom images (isCustom: true, customSrc: '/path/to/image.svg', optional customSrcActive for active state) like the Dela logo (RS_DelaDefault.svg / RS_Dela_Active.svg). Custom images are rendered as tags with class right-sidebar__dela-logo, while standard icons use the Icon component. All theme variants automatically include the Dela AI custom logo as the first item.
usagePatterns.panel-data-attributes: Items use data attributes to control ShellPanel behavior: panelTitle (defaults to label), panelIcon (defaults to item icon), panelContentId (optional identifier), and useGradientHeader (boolean). The script automatically detects Dela AI items (by title or .right-sidebar__dela-logo) and applies gradient header without explicit useGradientHeader attribute (lines 423-428).
